indicators.name: White couch
indicators.rationale: The white couch is too large and may obstruct the view of the computer screen.

indicators.name: Large windows
indicators.rationale: The large windows allow natural light to enter, which can reduce eye strain during computer work.

indicators.name: Ceiling lights
indicators.rationale: The ceiling lights provide additional artificial lighting, which can be useful when working late at night.

reasoning_summary: The space is marginally adequate for computer work (Solo) due to the presence of a large white couch that may obstruct the view of the computer screen, but it has large windows and ceiling lights that provide good natural and artificial lighting.
